title: CircleProgress
description: The single, server-side-computed, DIMENSIONLESS progress projection a member explicitly shares into an accountability circle (FR-SOC-001). Provided by Module 15 (Social) to Habits and Inbox. This object MUST NOT contain a raw monetary amount, currency, account identifier, or institution name — leak-proof BY CONSTRUCTION (there is no amount/account/institution field). The projection is derived from real GoalState/HabitProgress (never manual entry, FR-SOC-002) and is filtered BEFORE transmission. Carries a FreshnessStamp; a stale projection is FLAGGED (not withheld) because it is a dimensionless secondary metric with no money input (Constitution VIII).

circle_id.description: The circle this projection belongs to. Read access is authorized server-side against the requester's validated session identity and circle membership — never a client-supplied id (Threat Model, SC-015).

member_id.description: The circle member whose progress this is. An opaque circle-scoped member id — NOT an account or institution identifier.

display_name.description: The member's chosen circle display name (verbatim; not a financial identifier). May be null for self-rows the client labels locally.

is_self.description: true iff this row is the requesting member's own projection (UI distinguishes self from peers).

shared_metric_kind.description: The single dimensionless metric the member explicitly chose to share (FR-SOC-001). Amounts are NOT a valid kind — there is no amount field in this contract.

metric.description: Exactly one of the dimensionless metric values, matching shared_metric_kind. No money, no currency, no FX.

percentage_complete.description: Goal completion ratio in [0,1] as a DECIMAL STRING (string-encoded to defeat JSON float coercion, mirroring platform rate convention). Computed by the spine in arbitrary precision as current_amount/target_amount; Social transmits the ratio ONLY and never the underlying amounts. Display-rounded (e.g. 72,5 %) at the render edge via @finos/format. Present iff shared_metric_kind = percentage_complete.

streak_count.description: Habit streak length (whole days/sessions). Derived from real HabitProgress (FR-SOC-002). Present iff shared_metric_kind = streak_count.

pace_status.description: Mirrors GoalState.pace_status; 'unknown' when inputs are insufficient — never guessed. Present iff shared_metric_kind = pace_status.

display_label.description: A NON-FINANCIAL bilingual label for what is being tracked (e.g. a goal nickname like 'Summer trip'). Bilingual to satisfy FR-X-005; MUST NOT encode an amount, account, or institution.

source_kind.description: Whether the projection derives from a GoalState entry or a HabitProgress entry. The underlying source id is NOT exposed (privacy).

freshness.description: Freshness of the underlying GoalState/HabitProgress. is_stale=true ⇒ consumer FLAGS the projection (stale chip); not withheld (dimensionless secondary metric, no money input). Source-feed-down ⇒ Unavailable state, never a fabricated value (FR-X-008/FR-X-012).
